feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: most probably not for the last time
entry.summary:
Author: gigiLemon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,945Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The knights of Camelot would do anything for Camelot but most importantly they'd do everything for Arthur, their one true King. They would not hesitate to do anything he tells them to. Even now, they all wait for him to give his instructions as the druid’s words sink in. For the sealed tomb to be unlocked, it requires the defiling of an innocence. More specifically, a defiling of somebody innocent. A virgin’s first time is needed as a sacrifice. The tomb is enchanted, and within lies the one object that can stop Camelot from a monster of a certain doom. -OR-When the Knights go in search of something to save Camelot, they are told that the only way to do so is to sacrifice a virgin. None of the knights are; until of course, a certain non-knight manservant pipes up.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,351Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 72

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: Dissonance
entry.summary:
Author: BackToDust

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,674Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 183

Summary: Arthur survived the battle of Camlann. Long live the King. But since his return, a door in his mind and heart has been opened. The bond between him and Merlin is shifting, and so is the balance of the universe. A new prophecy begins to take shape, one that reveals the missing note of a broken song. More chapters and tags to come.

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,406Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 32

Summary: “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” With closed eyes, Merlin reached upward and imagined Arthur’s warm hand wrapping around his own. There was a sick irony in hearing this now, in these final moments. “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” For Merlin was alone. He died alone. ـــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

entry.title: The Weight of Unspoken Things
entry.summary:
Author: SunPyramid

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,954Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 39

Summary: In a Camelot ruled by fear, Merlin hides more than just magic—he hides the love he can never confess. As Arthur begins to defy Uther’s cruelty, suspicion turns toward the servant who stands closest to the prince. With traps set, loyalties tested, and feelings brought dangerously close to the surface, both must face the question they fear most: how much are they willing to risk—for truth, for freedom, and for each other?

entry.summary:
Author: KidnappingButMakeItGay

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,048Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 428,192Chapters: 92/100Kudos: 546

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,593Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 14

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,967Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,123Chapters: 55/67Kudos: 230

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: I place my hand upon yours.
entry.summary:
Author: ohmerthurcharm

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,723Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Prince Arthur is gifted a concubine called Merlin by his Father, when the warlock's ambitions are soon realised, he is quickly disposed of by the King of Camelot, Uther Pendragon. Unable to live without him, Arthur ends his own life, with the hopes of going back to a simpler time to write the wrongs done unto them.

entry.title: True of Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SprinkleHatesEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,832Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 11

Summary: "Since that day, magic began to occupy his thoughts more and more. Magic lived on in such a mundane way that Lancelot had a difficult time imagining who exactly it was that Uther had been fighting. Magic was everywhere, magic was in the heart of Camelot itself. Uther was definitely turning in his grave." OR Lancelot Du Lac is a selfless and honourable man with a strong sense of morality. He became a knight to defend and help the people around him. But when he starts to realise that he is complicit to a great injustice, as a feeling of helplessness starts to grip his heart as he watches his magical friend sacrifice himself from the shadows, he realises something needs to change

entry.title: Wormhole to Kingship
entry.summary:
Author: SH_After_Vesper

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,815Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 16

Summary: The statue was of a man, clean and untarnished, even as everything around it was in ruin. He was lying down, seductively, naked except for the thin cloth that only partially covered his intimacy.Most importantly, in his hand, he held the hilt of a sword. According to the prophecy, there was only one way to get it. To become King. --- Written for Merthur Microfic, prompt: Hole

entry.title: castle
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,607Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: They left the city at dawn. Arthur led. He moved with the easy confidence of someone who had walked the road many times before. Morgana stayed close beside him, as if making sure he wouldn’t disappear again. Merlin and Freya followed a few steps behind.

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,023Chapters: 10/55Kudos: 62

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: If I told you myself
entry.summary:
Author: riverray

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,360Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 1,044

Summary: Merlin can’t remember the last time he’s locked his bedroom door, if ever. But he chooses not to think about it. He merely sulks his way back to his bed, taking a moment to contemplate taking off his trousers and tunic from the night before. He decides not to think about that either. Instead, he decides not to think at all. He just falls back into his bed, covers up his body more so in shame than for warmth, and closes his eyes.   Basically Merlin is sexually assaulted and this story follows how he and everyone else deals with it. Spoiler alert: THEY DON'T HANDLE IT WELL.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
